title: Freedom of Information Act
description: Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) at the Department of Energy
text:
Please submit your FOIA requests electronically through the FOIA.gov site. This ensures that your request is received in a timely manner.
Do you want to submit a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request to the Department of Energy?
You have come to the right place.
